sections.paragraph:
, עֵרֹם, pl. עֵירֻמִּים i.q. עָרֹם-

(1) adj. naked, Gen 3:7, 10 , 11 .

(2) subst. nakedness. Eze 16:7, וְאַתְּ עֵרֹם וְעֶרְיָה “thou also (wast) nakedness and necessity,” i.e. utterly naked and helpless (abstr. for concr. like שָׁלֹום, קֹדֶשׁ). Verse 22 Eze 16:22, 39 Eze 16:39 23:29 . Root עָרַם No. I.
